name: Bug report
about: A false positive, a false negative, a crash, or wrong output
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

<!-- A clear description. For a false positive/negative, paste the smallest code snippet that triggers it. -->

**Expected**
<!-- What you expected OrthoSec to report (or not report). -->

**To reproduce**
```
orthosec scan ...
```

**Environment**
- OrthoSec version: <!-- orthosec --version -->
- Install method: <!-- pip / npm / source / docker -->
- Python version:
- OS:

**Detector / rule** (if known)
